## Summary

- Formula(s): `<owner>/<repo>`
- Change type: new formula / formula update / metadata fix / removal

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `samx formula validate formulas`
- [ ] For git-backed formulas, confirmed `source.revision` is a 40- or 64-character lowercase commit SHA
- [ ] For updated formulas, confirmed capability ids remain stable or explained any breaking change below

## Formula Review

- [ ] Formula path matches `formulas/<owner>/<repo>.yaml`
- [ ] Formula has the schema header: `# yaml-language-server: $schema=../../schemas/formula.v1.schema.json`
- [ ] Source URL is public and does not use `file://`
- [ ] Formula and capability descriptions are concise and user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private URLs, or machine-specific paths are included

## Notes

Add context for reviewers, upstream links, capability purpose, or security considerations.
